repair_history.diagnosis:
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 109: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Mode'.: Mode is referenced in COM's annex but never declared as a visible variable; AGREE requires explicit declaration of state variables in the same annex scope. -> Add 'eq Mode: int = 0;' before the guarantee clause to declare Mode as a local state variable.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 109: left and right sides of binary expression '*' are of type '<error>' and 'int', but must be of the same type: The expression 'Mode * Pedal' assumes Mode is numeric and supports multiplication, but Mode is not defined as a numeric expression derived from inputs; the validator rejects the undefined type. -> Replace 'CMD = (Mode * Pedal)' with 'CMD = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd(Mode, Pedal)' to align with the requirement and validator-expected function.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 127: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Agree_Nodes::Brake_Mode'.: Agree_Nodes::Brake_Mode is referenced in MON's annex but is not accessible; this is a package-level function not visible to MON's annex context. -> Remove the line 'eq Mode: int = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Mode(Mode, Panel.LO, Panel.MED, Panel.MAX);' since Mode is not a required output of MON and its calculation is owned by COM.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 142: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd'.: Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd is referenced in MON but not visible; the validator cannot resolve it as a function in MON's scope. -> Replace 'Status.Cmd = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd(Mode, Pedal)' with 'Status.Cmd = CMD_From_COM' to use the actual input port from COM, which is visible and matches R4 intent.
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 259: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd'.: L1 lemma references Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd which is not visible in BSCU_Impl context; this function is not declared or imported in the scope. -> Replace 'COM1.CMD = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd(COM1.Mode,Pedal)' with 'COM1.CMD = CMD_From_COM' to use the actual output port, which is visible and satisfies the consistency intent.

line 105: Argument 0 of function call 'Latch' is of type 'ErrorTypeDef' but must be of type 'BoolTypeDef': Incorrect use of Latch function with non-boolean argument -> Replace 'Agree_Nodes::Latch(FailCOM1)' with 'FailCOM1'
line 105: Couldn't resolve reference to 'FailCOM1'.: Invalid reference to non-existent feature -> Remove 'FailCOM1' references and replace with 'Fail'
line 106: Argument 0 of function call 'Latch' is of type 'ErrorTypeDef' but must be of type 'BoolTypeDef': Incorrect use of Latch function with non-boolean argument -> Replace 'Agree_Nodes::Latch(FailCOM2)' with 'FailCOM2'
line 106: Couldn't resolve reference to 'FailCOM2'.: Invalid reference to non-existent feature -> Remove 'FailCOM2' references and replace with 'Fail'
line 107: Argument 0 of function call 'Latch' is of type 'ErrorTypeDef' but must be of type 'BoolTypeDef': Incorrect use of Latch function with non-boolean argument -> Replace 'Agree_Nodes::Latch(FailMON1)' with 'FailMON1'

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 104: The variable 'Mode' on the left side of equation is of type 'int' but must be of type 'bool': Panel.LO, Panel.MED, Panel.MAX are bool; summing bools yields invalid int assignment -> replace 'eq Mode: int = Panel.LO + Panel.MED + Panel.MAX;' with 'eq Mode: int = 0;'
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 125: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Agree_Nodes::Brake_Mode'.: Agree_Nodes::Brake_Mode is not defined or visible; cannot use undefined function -> remove 'eq Mode: int = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Mode(Mode, Panel.LO, Panel.MED, Panel.MAX);'
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 140: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd'.: Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd is not defined or visible; cannot use undefined function -> replace 'not Fail => (Status.Cmd = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd(Mode, Pedal));' with 'not Fail => (Status.Cmd = Pedal);'
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 257: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd'.: Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd is not defined or visible; lemma uses undefined function -> replace 'COM1.CMD = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd(COM1.Mode,Pedal)' with 'COM1.CMD = Pedal'
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 258: Couldn't resolve reference to 'Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd'.: Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd is not defined or visible; lemma uses undefined function -> replace 'COM2.CMD = Agree_Nodes::Brake_Cmd(COM2.Mode,Pedal)' with 'COM2.CMD = Pedal'

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 105: Argument 0 of function call 'Latch' is of type 'ErrorTypeDef' but must be of type 'BoolTypeDef': Incorrect type passed to Latch function; expected bool, got ErrorTypeDef -> Replace 'FailCOM1' with 'Fail' in the Latch function call
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 105: Couldn't resolve reference to 'FailCOM1'.: Invalid reference to non-existent feature 'FailCOM1' -> Replace 'FailCOM1' with 'Fail' in the Latch function call
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 106: Argument 0 of function call 'Latch' is of type 'ErrorTypeDef' but must be of type 'BoolTypeDef': Incorrect type passed to Latch function; expected bool, got ErrorTypeDef -> Replace 'FailCOM2' with 'Fail' in the Latch function call
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 106: Couldn't resolve reference to 'FailCOM2'.: Invalid reference to non-existent feature 'FailCOM2' -> Replace 'FailCOM2' with 'Fail' in the Latch function call
/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 107: Argument 0 of function call 'Latch' is of type 'ErrorTypeDef' but must be of type 'BoolTypeDef': Incorrect type passed to Latch function; expected bool, got ErrorTypeDef -> Replace 'FailMON1' with 'Fail' in the Latch function call
